zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice de Craon II於大約1132年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧時，他的父親Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon33歲，母親Isabelle de Vitre33歲。他於大約1170年與Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1158年登記服兵役。他去世於1196年7月12日享年65歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪曼其薩維尼勒-維額。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice de Craon II于大约1132年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧时，他的父亲Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon33岁，母亲Isabelle de Vitre33岁。他于大约1170年与Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1158年登记服兵役。他去世于1196年7月12日享年65岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪曼其薩維尼勒-維額。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice de Craon II was born about 1132, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, was 33 and his mother, Isabelle de Vitre, was 33. He married Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne about 1170. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1158. He died on 12 July 1196, at the age of 65, and was buried in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice de Craon II est né environ 1132, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Vitre, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1158. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1196, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice de Craon II um 1132 in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon 33 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Vitre 33. Er hat um 1170 Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1158 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 12. Juli 1196 im Alter von 65 Jahren und wurde in Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia
it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice de Craon II è nato il circa 1132 nel Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Vitre, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1158. Morì il 12 luglio 1196, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice de Craon IIが約1132年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンクラオンで生まれた時，父Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craonは33歳，母Isabelle de Vitreは33歳であった。約1170年にIsabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1158年に兵役登録をした。彼は1196年7月12日に65歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサヴィグニー-レ-ヴィエウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라
ko.lifeSummary: Maurice de Craon II(이)가 대략 1132년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Vitre(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1170년 Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1158년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1196년 7월 12일 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 서아비그니-레-비우스에 묻혔다.

pt.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice de Craon II nasceu aproximadamente 1132, em Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Vitre, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1158. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1196, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice de Craon II родился около 1132 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Vitre, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne около 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1158 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 12 июля 1196 г. в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности савигни-ле-виеукс, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurice de Craon II nació aproximadamente 1132, en Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Craon, I Seigneur de Craon, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Vitre, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1158. Murió el 12 de julio de 1196, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Savigny-le-Vieux, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
